title: Prepared-state OpenClaw gateway dogfood
user_task: As Eva, inspect prepared Codex session cards, choose the highest-priority attention item, and expand only bounded summary-leaf evidence before deciding the next safe action.
expected_public_safe_evidence: stale partial unknown and low-confidence reason codes
agent recommendation derived from prepared refs and bounded summary evidence
proof_boundary: Dry-run fixture and OpenClaw gateway dogfood scenario for deterministic prepared-card and attention-inbox materialization over public-safe summary leaves. It proves advisory local prepared Codex state handoff for OpenClaw/Eva only when paired with a public-safe `loo openclaw tool-smoke` report that invokes prepared-state tools, emits an agent recommendation, and records `rawTranscriptRead=false`. It does not prove model compaction, true Codex compaction-summary capture, live control, GUI mutation, unattended autonomy, release readiness, or 1.2 GA readiness.
next_action: Attach issue-specific OpenClaw gateway dogfood evidence for #413, then continue #414 and #415 behind their explicit canary/protocol boundaries.
